name: GIGABYTE Z790 D DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790 D DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: High-end ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, Z790 chipset, PCIe 5.0, and DDR4 support.
